name: build_automation_prefill_url
description: Build a cursor.com Automations prefill URL from a reviewed Cursor Automation workflow JSON. Use only when the user explicitly asks for Cursor Automations. Returns the URL as plain text; the caller is expected to open it via open_resource or surface it to the user. Read-only: does not call the backend or create any automation.

workflow.description: Reviewed Cursor Automation Workflow proto JSON. Include triggers, actions, prompts, model, gitConfig, agentOptions, memoryEnabled, etc. The exact same shape passed to create_automation.workflow.

name.description: Optional display name carried into the prefilled Automations form.

description.description: Optional short description carried into the prefilled Automations form.

templateId.description: Optional template id; passed through to the Automations form when prefilling from a template-like draft.
